name: Hobby Collection | Full-Stack Gallery
detail: A full-stack application for managing collectible inventories, featuring secure JWT authentication, relational storage via PostgreSQL, and optimized media delivery via Cloudinary. Implements Redis for targeted data caching to reduce database read overhead on frequent queries.

name: Hobby Collection Test Suites
detail: An automated test suite for Hobby Collection, utilizing Playwright for E2E and API testing, and k6 for performance testing, ensuring robust application reliability and performance under various scenarios.

name: Ama3 Bot | AI-Powered Discord Bot
detail: An AI-integrated Discord bot designed for lightweight, contextual interaction with users, leveraging structured prompt logic to generate responsive and adaptive conversational behavior.

name: Lightweight Link Shortener
detail: A lightweight, low-latency URL shortener featuring a responsive Tailwind UI and unique short-hash generation. Built on a modular Go and PostgreSQL backend framework designed to support seamless utility integration.
